title: 14U Takes Tournament Title in Extra Innings
excerpt: A dramatic walk-off double in the eighth inning sealed the championship for the Falcons 14U squad at the Brooklyn Spring Classic.
author: Coach Staff

title: Meet Marcus: From 8U to Varsity Starter
excerpt: Marcus joined the Falcons at age seven. Now a varsity starter at Lincoln HS, he credits the program for shaping his work ethic and love of the game.
author: Coach Staff

title: Two New College Commitments Announced
excerpt: Congratulations to Devon R. and Jamal T., who have committed to play Division II baseball this fall. Both are Falcons alumni from the 2023 class.
author: Coach Staff

title: Tutoring Program Sees Record Enrollment
excerpt: Our after-school tutoring program hit a new high this semester with 42 student-athletes enrolled across all age groups, up 30% from last spring.
author: Coach Staff

title: Spring Clinic Series Starts May 3rd
excerpt: Open to all skill levels ages 6-14. Four Saturday sessions covering hitting, fielding, pitching fundamentals, and base running. Free for Falcons members.
author: Coach Staff

title: April in Pictures: 32 New Photos
excerpt: Game day highlights, practice candids, team celebrations, and community events from an action-packed month of Falcons baseball.
author: Coach Staff
